mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates for equity valuations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 5.0% signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer spending expectations, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicate robust aggregate demand, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60d returns with Rank IC > 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: An industrial production index below 90.0 reflects severe supply-side contraction that suppresses corporate earnings, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over one week.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns remain positive in >50% of instances when INDPRO falls below 90.0.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation combined with low policy rates creates a negative real rate environment that initially boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year rolling window or signal predicts negative returns when real rates are negative.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls indicate strengthening labor demand that supports corporate revenue growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth falling below 1.0% signals demand stagnation that reduces earnings forecasts, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >65% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between industrial production and unemployment, where production rises while unemployment falls, confirms synchronized economic strength, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Interaction term fails to improve predictive power over single-series models with p-value < 0.05.
